title: Iaeiros #2383
definition:
Jairus = "whom God enlightens"

 1) a ruler of a synagogue, probably near the western shore of the Sea
    of Galilee
nasbUsage:

    of Galilee

    NASB:  Jairus, the ruler of a synagogue in Pal.:
